testcase.name: test_get_glossary_words_authenticated
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_glossary.py:44: in test_get_glossary_words_authenticated assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Session expired"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
